completed_tasks.name: Plan 30-01: Visual infrastructure (visualConfig, useAudioAnalyser, useAnimationFrame, vitest-canvas-mock)
Fix: TTS audio routing through GainNode
Visual upgrade: Canvas2D icosahedron + star particles
Visual upgrade: React Three Fiber + bloom post-processing

human_actions_pending.action: Visual UAT in browser — run npm run dev, test all phases, check bloom/wireframe/distortion quality
human_actions_pending.context: Three.js upgrade just committed, user hasn't verified the R3F version yet

decisions.decision: Replaced Canvas 2D with React Three Fiber (three.js)
decisions.rationale: User wanted professional-quality 3D visuals — Canvas 2D looked amateur

decisions.decision: TTS audio routed through GainNode instead of direct to destination
decisions.rationale: AnalyserNode was getting zero data because audio bypassed GainNode

decisions.decision: IdleAnimation always visible, EqualizerVisualizer as overlay
decisions.rationale: Hard switch caused blank screen during speech when equalizer had no data

decisions.decision: Star particles with twinkle instead of flat dots
decisions.rationale: User feedback: dots looked too simple for art installation
User wanted geometric polyhedron look, bloom gives ethereal quality

next_action: Run npm run dev, test the Three.js icosahedron with bloom. User may want visual tweaks (bloom intensity, colors, wireframe thickness). Then complete phase 30 verification.
context_notes: Phase 30 execution is nearly complete — both plans done, all automated tests pass. Only remaining item is browser UAT (Task 3 checkpoint). User has been iterating on visual quality: bars→aura→Canvas2D polyhedron→Three.js polyhedron. The R3F version with bloom should be a significant quality jump but hasn't been verified in browser yet. 30-02-SUMMARY.md still needs to be created after UAT passes.
